description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-grade metal toolbox with a rectangular form and reinforced rounded corners, designed for durability and protection. The box is painted in a pale, weathered gray color, showing signs of age and use, with some rust and surface stains. The lid is hinged and opens upward, revealing a control panel with several knobs, switches, and a large analog meter, as well as a detailed instruction plate on the inside of the lid. There is a sturdy metal handle on the front for carrying, and a mechanical crank protrudes from one side, suggesting the box contains specialized electrical or measurement equipment, likely a megohmmeter. The corners are protected by thick, bolted-on bumpers, and the box sits on four short feet. The overall construction is robust, with visible screws and metal fittings, indicating it is built to withstand rough handling in urban or industrial environments.
description: A heavy-duty, weathered metal toolbox with reinforced corners, a hinged lid, and a control panel featuring knobs, switches, and an analog meter. It includes a front handle, side crank, and detailed instructions inside the lid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the closed lid, reinforced corners, and the main carrying handle.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open lid, thick corner bumpers, and the side profile of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid open, exposing the control panel, analog meter, and instruction plate inside the lid.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the mechanical crank, open lid, and the robust construction of the box.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular steel handle mounted on the front, designed for carrying; robust and ergonomic for heavy loads.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Metal clasp latch on the front, likely steel, with a simple manual locking mechanism; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with a fixed control panel and analog meter; no removable trays or dividers visible.
